hero.description: More than a rental company. We are a collective of Nordschleife enthusiasts dedicated to the pursuit of the perfect lap through heritage, precision, and safety.

book.title: Book your experience
book.description: Select your date and vehicle below.

notFound.title: You left the racing line.
notFound.description: This lap doesn't exist. Even we get lost at the Nordschleife sometimes. Time for a pit stop—head back to the garage.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and for analytics.

fleet.title: Choose your beast
fleet.description: Our fleet is meticulously maintained by track-specialized engineers to ensure peak performance for every lap.

packages.arriveDriveDesc: The "Arrive and Drive" package includes the first tank of fuel, and the use of our lap ticket. This saves you from refuelling at the end of your rental, and from queuing in line to buy your lap tickets.
packages.basicDesc: This only rents the car. Lap tickets and fuel are NOT included.

mini-cooper-s.description: The new MINI Cooper S offers a more powerful, more stable platform. Its paddle-shift DCT gearbox allows drivers to concentrate on the track ahead, while allowing faster, error-free, gear shifts.
mini-cooper-s.feature3: Stripped out and fitted with a full Wiechers rollcage, Recaro racing seats and Schroth harnesses
mini-cooper-s.feature4: Upgraded with our own custom Öhlins DFV suspension and uniball control arms
mini-cooper-s.feature5: Lightweight, 17" Pro-Track alloys with Ultra High Performance tires
mini-cooper-s.feature6: Milltek Sports exhaust and sports air intake
mini-cooper-s.feature7: Upgraded brakes with top-spec Endless Racing pads, fluid and hoses

toyota-gr-yaris.description: The updated GR Yaris is the perfect rental car for tackling the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Together with our driver-focused modifications, it delivers an exhilarating, confidence-inspiring experience for drivers of all skill levels. Its paddle-shift transmission and rally-bred engineering make it a dependable track weapon in any weather.
toyota-gr-yaris.feature2: Advanced AWD system for incredible grip and stability
toyota-gr-yaris.feature3: Seamless 8-speed automatic transmission with paddle shifters
toyota-gr-yaris.feature4: Custom MCS 3Way Remote suspension, perfectly tuned for the Nürburgring
toyota-gr-yaris.feature5: 18" lightweight wheels with high-performance road-legal race tires
toyota-gr-yaris.feature6: Roll-caged, with Recaro racing seats and Schroth harnesses for maximum safety and support
toyota-gr-yaris.feature7: Upgraded brakes with Endless pads, and Motul fluid

toyota-gr-supra.description: The newest addition to our rental fleet, the Supra is a fantastic RWD sportscar, capable of smooth and fast laps in the right hands.
toyota-gr-supra.feature3: Factory GT4 control arms, featuring uniballs and our own camber+toe correction upgrades!
toyota-gr-supra.feature4: Roll-caged, with Recaro Pole Position racing seats and Schroth harnesses
toyota-gr-supra.feature6: Upgraded brakes using Motul fluid and Endless pads
toyota-gr-supra.feature7: Excellent handling characteristics, high grip, and strong acceleration

porsche-taycan-turbo-gt.description: The fastest electric car ever to lap the Nürburgring. Instant torque from dual electric motors and Porsche's legendary chassis engineering make this a truly surreal experience.
porsche-taycan-turbo-gt.feature3: Full Wiechers rollcage, Recaro racing seats and Schroth harnesses

porsche-spyder-rs.description: Our Porsche 718 Spyder RS with Weissach Package offers one of the most thrilling driving experiences for the Nürburgring Nordschleife. With its high-revving naturally aspirated flat-six engine, cutting-edge PDK transmission, and lightweight design, this rental car is built to conquer one of the world's most challenging circuits.
porsche-spyder-rs.feature1: 500hp naturally aspirated flat-six engine, revving to 9,000 rpm
porsche-spyder-rs.feature2: 7-speed PDK automatic transmission for lightning-fast shifts
porsche-spyder-rs.feature3: Weissach Package: Carbon fiber components for reduced weight and enhanced aerodynamics
porsche-spyder-rs.feature4: Rear-wheel drive with precision chassis tuning for the Nordschleife
porsche-spyder-rs.feature5: Ultra-light magnesium wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires
porsche-spyder-rs.feature6: Aerodynamic enhancements, including a motorsport-inspired rear diffuser and spoiler
porsche-spyder-rs.feature7: Racing-inspired interior with carbon bucket seats, Alcantara trim, and lightweight design

porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.description: The Porsche 992 GT3 RS is the ultimate expression of track-ready performance, perfectly suited for the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Straight from the factory, this car delivers precision, power, and handling, ensuring an unforgettable experience for drivers seeking a refined, high-performance machine.
porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.feature1: 525hp naturally aspirated flat-six engine, revving to 9,000 rpm
porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.feature2: Rear-wheel drive with advanced aerodynamics for maximum downforce and cornering stability
porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.feature4: Track-focused Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires
porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.feature5: Lightweight wheels for reduced unsprung weight
porsche-911-gt3-rs-992.feature6: Racing-inspired interior with carbon fiber bucket seats and a motorsport steering wheel

ferrari-296-gtb.description: The hybrid supercar from Maranello. The 296 GTB pairs a twin-turbo V6 with an electric motor for 830hp of combined output, wrapped in Ferrari's signature driving drama and stunning Italian design.
ferrari-296-gtb.feature3: Full Wiechers rollcage and racing harnesses
ferrari-296-gtb.feature4: Ferrari Active Suspension with Side Slip Control
ferrari-296-gtb.feature5: Carbon-ceramic brakes, Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

bookingGate.title: Before You Book
bookingGate.subtitle: Please confirm you meet the following requirements:
bookingGate.check1: I understand I must be at least 21 years old
bookingGate.check2: I understand I need a full and valid driving licence
bookingGate.check3: I understand I need basic understanding of English or German
bookingGate.check4: I understand I need a credit card or cash to guarantee the deposit
bookingGate.check5: I understand that if I do not fulfil these criteria on the day of my rental, my €100 pre-reservation fee is non-refundable
bookingGate.check6: I understand that if I cancel my booking with less than 72 hours notice, my pre-reservation fee is non-refundable
bookingGate.skillLevel: Recommended skill level: Novice to Expert!
bookingGate.heightLimit: Suitable for drivers up to approximately 195cm and 125kg
bookingGate.heightLimitNote: Contact us if you are this size or larger
bookingGate.basicLiabilityNote: Does not include guardrail, safety team, or recovery truck!
bookingGate.fullDayPolicy: For full-day openings we ask for a minimum booking of 4 laps. Drivers wanting fewer laps can walk-in on the day, or book a mid-week evening session.

whyRent4Ring.heading: Why Rent4Ring?
whyRent4Ring.intro1: At Rent4Ring, we take a genuine motorsport approach to every car in our fleet. Each vehicle is upgraded and modified in-house by experts and enthusiasts to ensure top-tier performance and reliability.
whyRent4Ring.intro2: We never cut corners. Forget cheap "upgrades" or budget components—our cars are equipped with the finest racing parts available:
whyRent4Ring.closing: With Rent4Ring, you're not just renting a car, you're renting a premium motorsport experience.

brakes.label: HIGH FRICTION
brakes.title: Brakes (Endless)
brakes.description: We buy Endless racing pads for superior stopping power. Unmatched heat resistance and consistent bite for lap-after-lap precision.

suspension.label: PRECISION TUNING
suspension.title: Suspension (Öhlins)
suspension.description: Custom engineered Öhlins DFV or TTX setups for precision handling

tires.label: MECHANICAL GRIP
tires.title: Tires (Michelin / Yokohama)
tires.description: We prefer premium brands; most of our cars run Michelin and Yokohama track tires for maximum grip in every weather condition.

safety.label: TOTAL PROTECTION
safety.title: Safety (Wiechers / Recaro)
safety.description: Full German-made Wiechers roll cages, Recaro seats, and Schroth 4-point harnesses for ultimate driver safety.
